tools.name: camara_verify_number
tools.description: Verify that a phone number is valid and active on a Canadian carrier. Use for fraud prevention, identity verification, and account recovery flows.

tools.name: camara_detect_sim_swap
tools.description: Detect if a SIM card was recently swapped for the given phone number. Use to block account takeover attacks in banking and fintech apps.

max_age_hours.description: Check for swaps within this many hours

tools.name: camara_get_device_location
tools.description: Get approximate location of a device by phone number. Use for fraud detection (is the device where the user claims?) and logistics.
